holdings.infoBox: IWP is an equity ETF with a total of 280 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vertiv Holdings Co stock at 3.97%, Howmet Aerospace at 3.73%, Quanta Services at 2.68%, Hilton Worldwide Holdings at 2.62%, and Royal Caribbean Cruises at 2.51%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell Mid-Cap Growth ETF (IWP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell Midcap Growth index, a market-cap-weighted index of growth companies chosen from a set of the 800-smallest Russell 1000 companies using two growth factors. IWP was launched on Jul 17, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
